'FT. fa. 98(sr):—%ffto wvm, mw« atorfa aftr »PT: snrrtt q^ltf W^tT "TTTK ffftTRT wfafopT, 1988 ( 1 9 8 8 *PT 46) & HPT 10 tf 447 GI/92 (1) -- 1 of 2 -- - -> THE GAZETTE OF INDIA ; KXTRAORDINARY [PARI 11-SEC. fl (i)] SWTO ( 1) STTT 3H?rT Wf^ff *fTT 5FTTT ^ ^ g^, *TRfT ^T^^p- % SrqT ^f%^ faj. *T. 820/2/90-fH". 5T. 5TT. *3T.] MINISTRY OF FINANCE (Department of Revenue) ORDER New Delhi, the 17th February, 1992 G.S.R. 98(E).--In exercise of the powers conferred by Sub-section (I) of Section 10 the Prevention of Illicit Traffic in Narcotic Drugs and Psychotropic Substances Act, 1988 (46 of 1988), the Central Government hereby specially empowers Additional Secretary (Admn), Department of Revenue, Government of India, for the purpose of the said Section.
